genre_refs: Make America Great Again (MAGA slogan riff)
description: Department of Labor slogan and headline graphic. The background is a photograph of a welder at work inside an industrial factory: a person wearing a 'VULCAN' welding helmet, white t-shirt and denim or canvas apron, bent over a metal workpiece with bright blue and white sparks and smoke; rows of overhead industrial lights and steel structure recede behind. A dark navy gradient overlays the lower half. Centered headline text reads 'Make America' in white italic serif and 'SKILLED AGAIN!' in large bold white serif caps. Below are three torn paper style newspaper clippings with outlet logos: HR DIVE, 'DOL to provide $30M in training grants on AI, skilled trades'; POLITICO PRO, 'Trump administration announces new workforce development plan'; and NTD, 'Department of Labor Says College-for-All Model Failed, Unveils New Workforce Plan.'
notable_text: Make America SKILLED AGAIN! / DOL to provide $30M in training grants on AI, skilled trades / Trump administration announces new workforce development plan / Department of Labor Says College-for-All Model Failed, Unveils New Workforce Plan
